# Downstream handoff

Use this compact handoff when another SDLC desk needs the requirements.

## Handoff target

Name the next desk: technical discovery, architecture design, issue planning, test strategy, verification, security, or implementation handoff.

## Requirement summary

List requirement IDs and one-line descriptions.

## Accepted scope

What is in scope.

## Explicit non-goals

What is out of scope.

## Required source facts

Facts downstream desks must preserve.

## Open blockers

Questions that block later stages.

## Token-efficiency note

Prefer IDs, tables, and exact constraints over long prose so later coding agents do not waste tokens re-deriving requirements.
